content.full_text:
October 23, 2000

Robert B. Garcia
629 J Street, Suite 500
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-00-236

Dear Mr. Garcia:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of October 19, 2000, you stated that no written response was required to your inquiry dated, October 13, 2000.

If you have any additional questions, please contact me at 916/322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: [signature]
Kevin S. Moen
Political Reform Consultant
